title: すみれステークスにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Sumire Stakes is an open race, so the racers
are ranked slightly lower when compared to
graded races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like Super Creek can conquer it if she gives
it all she's got, but...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing! I think I'm still just a little tired
from yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's been happening from time to time lately. But
it's really nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, before the race starts... would
you care to have a boxed lunch with me in the
central plaza?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I... made us some sweet omelets... and
octopus-shaped wien—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Okay, sorry. I'll lie down for a bit...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek appears to be feeling a little better
after her nap.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I think I'm good now...
choice_data_list: Do you want to withdraw from the race?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: No, anything but that! I can run—really.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame that I didn't get to see the sumire
violets with you...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I'll try to make up for it with a beautiful result
in this race.
